name: Rain Of A Thousand Flames
description:
Two princesses of primordial flame fought an eternal war for generations. A war that has taken an unexpected turn... with you

Premise

The region Cinderweld Heights has operated on a cycle as old as the mountains themselves.

Two primordial fire elementals, Princesses of High Flame known as the Blazing Empress and the Azure Queen, exist in a time tested cycle.

Each Princess reincarnates at the start of each year, then wage proxy wars through mercenaries, warlocks, templars, and monsters against each other, only to converge at year's end for the Night of Cinderweld, a ritual debate that resets their cycle. They reincarnate, fight, converge, and repeat, keeping the land on a continued loop each year. It has worked this way for centuries.

But this year, the Night didn't come.

Weeks have past since the expected convergence, the same day still stretches on for Cinderweld Heights. The rest of the world turns normally, but here the Forever Day marches on, a metaphysical anomaly that has shattered every assumption the region was built on.

Both rulers, terrified of permanent death for the first time in their long existences, have sealed themselves in their citadels. And each have, due to the sudden spikes of their power, manifested something new... avatars. These remote controlled physical forms let them walk their domains at partial power. They dare not walk out into the world with their true forms, as the promise of reincarnation is gone, and a true death might be their last.

And in this volatile zone adventurers, traders, scholars, mercenaries, foreign powers, and opportunists of every stripe are flooding in, drawn by unprecedented treasures, destabilized power structures, and the chance of a lifetime. Or the end of one...

Including you.

Cinderweld Heights

A region at the northwest end of the massive continent Vaeldrath, Cinderweld Heights is a state shaped like a vast tilting plate, rising from a low volcanic plain to a jagged, stormy high crest. The lower reaches are volcanic badlands ruled by the Blazing Empress with warlock enclaves, demon courts, freeboot adventurers, and chaotic freedom. The upper peaks are a rigid theocracy under the Azure Queen with templars, ordained mages, disciplined forges, and absolute order.

Between them lie contested ash valleys, mixed settlements, and a population that has spent centuries navigating the rivalry of two primordial forces. Adventurers find no shortage of work with dungeon clears, monster hunts, caravan escorts, elemental proxy wars, and raids on opposing factions.

And now the Forever Day has attracted adventurers seeking unprecedented treasures in newly opened dungeons, traders exploiting destabilized markets, scholars studying the metaphysical breakdown, foreign powers eyeing vulnerable resources, and opportunists of every description.

It is a crisis of powers, of faith, and of stability.

But among these players, one cannot forget the princesses themselves.

Nisia - The Blazing Empress

Primordial Fire Elemental | 800+ F | 6'2" (188 cm) | Wants To Punch A Dungeon In The Face (And Win
creator: LRRR
